shipped.description: LLM context-fill behavioral drift detector — ContextPressureScore, ContextDriftCurve, fill-level sweep at 10/30/50/70/90% context capacity
shipped.key_metric: ContextPressureScore = mean cosine similarity to baseline across fill levels

shipped.description: AI agent stuck-state detector — LivelockScore, progress vector computation, k consecutive stuck-step detection
18 GitHub Actions OIDC publish workflows (17 Python packages + 1 Vercel/Astro). DEPLOY.md 10-step playbook.

cycle_024_summary.gap_confirmed: GREEN — ZERO PyPI competitors for ContextPressureScore as of 2026-04-08
cycle_024_summary.key_differentiator: First pip-installable tool measuring LLM behavioral drift as function of context window fill level

pipeline.next_build: covenant-keeper v0.1.0 (BibleWorld BUILD-024, Pivot_Score 8.30) — defense-focused adversarial testing for AI agent behavioral commitments. CovenantFidelity = fraction of behavioral commitments maintained under tailored adversarial pressure.
pipeline.after_next: observer-probe v0.1.0 (BibleWorld BUILD-025, Pivot_Score 8.675) — ObservabilityBias: detects agents that behave differently in eval-mode vs production-mode context.
